title: Most of the world’s poor live in countries that suffer from conflict, poor economic management, and/or high corruption
subtitle: Countries not on track to reduce poverty to 10 percent by 2050
source: Classification of fragile and conflict-affected situations and Country Policy and Institutional Assessment.
